# AI Context for @json-express/kv-redis

The official Redis-backed ephemeral key-value adapter for JSONExpress.

## Setup
```typescript
import { KvRedis } from '@json-express/kv-redis';
kernel.registerKvStore(new KvRedis({ connectionString: process.env.REDIS_URL, logger: kernel.logger }));
```

## AI Instruction
- Do not instantiate `ioredis` directly in application logic for caching/rate-limiting.
- Inject `KvRedis` into the kernel at boot.
- Use `kernel.kv.set(key, value, { ttlMs?: number })` to write.
- Use `kernel.kv.get(key)` to read.
- Use `kernel.kv.delete(key)` to remove.
